faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and professional techniques that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in New Springville, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: New Springville commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Our exterminators are experienced in identifying and safely removing all species found in Staten Island, using the most effective treatment methods for each type.
